# LOMSetupRequestCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

## Declaration

```swift
object LOMSetupRequestCommand
```

## Objects

- **LOMSetupRequestCommand.Command**: The command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).

## Commands and responses

- **LOMSetupRequestResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to get information from a device to set up lights-out management (LOM).
